en: I know you probably waited for me. A little bit.
ko: 시간을 내줘서 고마워. 아마 나를 조금 기다렸을 거야.

en: I want you to know that I do not take that for granted.
ko: 그걸 당연하게 여기지 않는다는 걸 알아줬으면 해.

en: Oh, come on. What's that? Oh, this is an Osteo National Bone Density Scanner.
Oh. A company I bought it to prior to going to work at Witter.
ko: 내가 블리터에서 일하기 전에 산 거야.

en: I have a meeting after the game. You guys are going to the game? Oh, yeah.
We're going, too. I'm taking my son, Tim, my 12-year-old. We were just leaving. Tim!
Listen, we'll get out of your way. Again, thank you very much, and I'm sorry about the other day,
and I hope that we can reschedule for later this week. You got it. Thank you very much, sir.
ko: 이번 주 후반에 다시 일정을 잡을 수 있기를 바래. 알겠어.

en: All right. You take care. Here, come on. Say bye-bye, Chris. Bye.
Bye, Christopher. Hey, you guys want to come with us?
To Candlestick? We're going now. Come with us. Where are your seats?
We are upper deck. We got a box. Come on. You want to sit in the box?
It's not actually a box. It's a private section. It's more comfortable.
